name: diag-dashed
description: Count edges by type and verify mentor routing.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1200)); const sm = window.__qualiaRenderer.getSceneManager(); const edges = sm._store.getActiveEdges(); const byType = {}; for (const e of edges) byType[e.type] = (byType[e.type] || 0) + 1; const mentorType = sm._store.edgeTypeRegistry.get('mentors'); const em = sm.edgeMesh; return { totalEdges: edges.length, byType, mentorDescriptor: mentorType ? { dash: mentorType.dash, directional: mentorType.directional } : null, dashedInstances: em.dashedSegments.geometry.instanceCount }; })()
